'''Ion Team''' was a unit of [[Clone commando/Legends|clone commandos]] attached to the [[22nd Air Combat Wing]].

==History==
The four commandos that made up Ion Team were [[Captain/Legends|Captain]] [[Climber (clone)|Climber]], [[Trace (clone)|Trace]], [[Ras]], and a [[Ion Team's spec-one|comlink specialist]].

They fought at the [[Siege of Deko Neimoidia|Battle of Deko Neimoidia]] alongside [[Jedi General/Legends|Jedi General]] [[Roan Shryne]]. They were later dispatched from [[Boz Pity/Legends|Boz Pity]] to the [[Battle of Murkhana (Clone Wars)|Battle of Murkhana]].

Ion Team refused to execute [[Roan Shryne]], [[Bol Chatak]], and [[Padawan/Legends|Padawan]] [[Olee Starstone]] when they received [[Order 66/Legends|Order 66]] from Chancellor Palpatine, believing it to be a false enemy signal. They then saved the [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] from being ambushed by the forces of [[Clone Commander/Legends|Commander]] [[Salvo (clone trooper)|Salvo]] by setting up a counter-ambush and allowing them to escape.

Later, [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Darth Vader]] [[Mission to Murkhana (Great Jedi Purge)|arrived]] on [[Murkhana/Legends|Murkhana]] and killed two members of the team, but Captain Climber and Trace escaped into the forested hills of Murkhana. Vader ordered his men to hunt the commandos down and return them to him alive. After Vader decapitated Bol Chatak, a [[Clone shock trooper/Legends|clone shock trooper]] informed him that the commandos had been apprehended, and he sent them to be imprisoned on [[Agon Nine]].
